Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Implement Scanner Core API for Stories 5.23-5.27

Scanner workflow system with guided operations:

Stories implemented:
- 5.23: Scanner Guided Workflows - workflow definitions & session management
- 5.24: Barcode Validation - parse & validate LP/location/product/pallet barcodes
- 5.25: Scanner Feedback - consistent response format (success/error/warning + sound/vibrate)
- 5.26: Scanner Operations Menu - role-based operation filtering
- 5.27: Scanner Session Timeout - 30min auto-expire + refresh endpoint

New files:
- lib/scanner/workflow-definitions.ts - workflow configs (receive/move/pick/putaway/count/lookup)
- api/scanner/workflows/start/route.ts - POST start workflow session
- api/scanner/workflows/[id]/scan/route.ts - POST process scan in workflow
- api/scanner/validate-barcode/route.ts - POST validate barcode format & entity
- api/scanner/operations/route.ts - GET operations menu for user role
- api/scanner/session/refresh/route.ts - POST refresh session timeout

Features:
- Step-by-step guided workflows
- Barcode format validation (LP-*, LOC-*, PRD-*, PLT-*, PO-*, WO-*, ASN-*)
- Entity lookup from database
- Role-based permissions
- Session management (in-memory, TODO: Redis)
- Scanner-optimized responses (sound/vibrate feedback)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
